deconstruction_targets: Bibliographic records of Le Maillet des Sorcières and Stephanus Gueynard's edition
The existence and authenticity of the Malleus Maleficarum editions listed in Oswald Weigel's collection
summary: The text primarily deconstructs bibliographic claims about the Malleus Maleficarum, listing numerous editions while casting doubt on their existence or authenticity without offering constructive alternatives.
